brief: Market / Portal feature post for VOIDBORN — "Crack the Vaults". Rip sealed products and chase the spike. Each unopened cache is a dice roll toward a chase card or a bulk haul you can trade away. Explain sealed products / vault pulls — rip packs, chase spikes, trade surplus on the market. In-game credits economy (no real-money P2P). Instagram hype + link in bio; Facebook walkthrough; Discord steps + https://voidborn.fun.

image.prompt: Cinematic 1:1 shot of a glowing, ornate crystalline chest resting on cracked obsidian ground, emitting a vibrant purple and blue ethereal mist against a backdrop of a dying elemental storm, high contrast, dark fantasy aesthetic, intricate textures.
